craftsmanship.def: 工藝、技巧、職人精神人物 (單數) (藝)

crafty.ex: He is a very crafty and sly salesperson.

crag.ex: The bird nested on a rocky crag.

craggy.ex: He had a very old and craggy face.

cram.def: 塞滿、死記硬背的人的人人物 (單數) (填)
cram.col: cram for exams, cram school (補習班)
cram.ex: He had to cram for his history exam.

crammed.def: 擠滿的、填得滿滿的人的人 (或物) (擠)
crammed.ex: The local train was crammed with people.

crammer.def: 填鴨式教師、補習班人物 (單數) (補)
crammer.ex: The famed crammer helped him pass test.

cramp.def: 抽筋、約束、夾具的人的人人物 (單數) (抽)
cramp.col: writer's cramp, muscle cramp, cramp one's style
cramp.ex: He suffered a bad leg muscle cramp.

cramped.def: 狹窄的、受限的人的人 (或物) (窄)
cramped.ex: They lived in a very small cramped room.

cranberry.ex: She drank cold cranberry juice today.

crane.def: 起重機、鶴、伸長脖子的的人的人人物 (單數) (機/鶴)
crane.ex: They used a tower crane to lift heavy boxes.

cranium.ex: The thick cranium protects the brain.

crank.def: 曲柄、脾氣古怪的人、發動、奇想的人的人人物 (單數) (柄/怪)
crank.col: turn the crank, crank up (發動、調高)
crank.ex: You need to turn the crank to start it.

crankcase.ex: Oil leaked from the sealed crankcase.

crankshaft.ex: The engine has a broken crankshaft tonight.

cranky.ex: The baby is very tired and cranky tonight.

cranny.col: every nook and cranny (各個角落)
cranny.ex: He searched every nook and cranny.

crape/crepe.def: 縐紗、縐綢的人的人人物 (單數) (紗)
crape/crepe.ex: She wore a piece of black crape for mourning.

crapulous.def: 酒醉的人、放蕩的人的人物 (醉)
crapulous.ex: He was in a tired and crapulous state at day.

crash.def: 碰撞、墜毀、(計)當機、粗布的人的人人物 (單數) (撞)
crash.col: crash course, computer crash, plane crash
crash.ex: The computer crash lost all my data.

crash-land.def: 緊急降落、迫降的人的人
crash-land.ex: The pilot had to crash-land in field.

crass.ex: That was an act of crass stupidity tonight.

crassness.def: 愚魯、粗俗的人物 (單數) (醜)
crassness.ex: His general crassness offended the lady.

crate.def: 板條箱、大貨箱、裝入箱中的的人的人人物 (單數) (箱)
crate.ex: They packed the fruit into a wooden crate.

crater.def: 火山口、坑洞人物 (單數) (坑)
crater.ex: The bomb left a massive and deep crater.

cravat.ex: He wore a silk cravat with his suit.

crave.def: 渴望、渴求、請求的人的人
crave.ex: Most small kids crave for attention daily.

craven.def: 懦弱的、膽怯地人物、膽怯的人的人人物 (單數) (懦)
craven.ex: That was a craven act of betrayal tonight.

craving.ex: She has a strange craving for chocolate.

craw.def: (鳥)素囊、胃的人的人物 (單數) (囊)
craw.col: stick in one's craw (耿耿於懷)
craw.ex: His lie really sticks in my local craw.

crawfish/crayfish.def: 小龍蝦、淡水蝦的人的人人物 (單數) (蝦)
crawfish/crayfish.ex: He caught a small crawfish in the stream.

crawl.def: 爬行、緩慢移動、(泳)捷泳的人的人人物 (單數) (爬)
crawl.ex: The baby is just starting to learn to crawl.

crawler.def: 爬行者、(計)搜索軟體、諂媚者人物 (單數) (爬)
crawler.ex: The web crawler indexed the whole site.

crawling.ex: The floor was crawling with small ants.

crayon.def: 蠟筆、色粉筆、以蠟筆畫的人的人人物 (單數) (筆)
crayon.ex: She bought a box of colorful crayons now.

craze.def: 狂熱、時尚、發瘋、使裂地的人的人人物 (單數) (狂)
craze.ex: Cycling has become the latest fashion craze.

crazed.def: 發瘋的、龜裂的人的人 (或物) (狂)
crazed.ex: He was chased by a crazed local fan.

crazy.def: 瘋狂的、著迷的、傑出的的人物、最好的人的人人物 (單數) (狂)
crazy.ex: He is totally crazy about rock music.

creak.def: 咯吱聲、發出碎裂聲的人的人人物 (單數) (碎)
creak.ex: The old wood floor gave a loud creak.

creaky.def: 發出咯吱聲的、老朽地 (舊)
creaky.ex: The creaky stairs woke up the whole house.

cream.def: 奶油、精華、乳脂色、乳霜的人的人人物 (單數) (奶)
cream.col: ice cream, face cream, cream of the crop (精華)
cream.ex: They are the real cream of the crop here.

creamy.ex: The soap has a very rich and creamy feel.

crease.def: 摺痕、皺摺、使起皺的人的人人物 (單數) (摺)
crease.ex: He pressed a sharp crease into his pants.

create.def: 創造、造成、引起的人的人
create.ex: The new law will create many local jobs.

created.def: 創造了的、人造的人的人 (或物) (創)
created.ex: He took the newly created job at school.

creation.def: 創造(物)、產物、創世紀人物 (單數) (創)
creation.ex: Job creation is top priority for the city.

creative.def: 創意的、有創造力地的人的人物 (單數) (創)
creative.ex: She is taking a creative writing class now.

creativity.def: 創造力、創意的人物 (單數) (創)
creativity.ex: The project aims to unleash creativity.

creator.def: 創造者、上帝、創作者人物 (單數) (創)
creator.ex: He is a famous content creator on site.
